basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Guwahati Scientist C Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Guwahati
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Guwahati has released the official Scientist C (Medical/ Non-Medical/ Research Officer) Notification 2026 at the AIIMS Guwahati official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the AIIMS Guwahati Scientist C Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a maximum age of 40 years and qualifications including MBBS, BVSc, BDS, PG Degree, PhD, or equivalent in the relevant disciplines with the required experience and research publications can apply online until 27-07-2026. The official notification PDF, online application link, and walkin intervi

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 40 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS/BVSc/BDS with 3 years experience or PG/PhD (Medical), PG Degree or PhD in Public Health/Health Economics/HTA/Epidemiology/Biostatistics/Pharmaceutical sciences/Biotechnology/Biomedical Engineering/Data Science (Non-Medical), At least two research publications as first/corresponding author in SCI-indexed or Scopus Q1 journals
qualification.details: Scientist C (Medical/Non-Medical/Research Officer): Medical: MBBS/BVSc/BDS with 3 years experience or MBBS/BVSc/BDS + PhD/MPH or MBBS/BVSc/BDS + PG degree AND at least two research publications as first/corresponding author in SCI-indexed or Scopus Q1 journals. Non-Medical: PG Degree (Public Health, Health Economics, HTA, Epidemiology, Biostatistics, Pharmaceutical sciences, biotechnology, biomedical engineering, Data Science or related) with 3 years post qualification experience or PhD AND at least two research publications as first/corresponding author in SCI-indexed or Scopus Q1 journals.

selection_process: Shortlisting Written Test (if applicable) Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Guwahati Scientist C (Medical/Non-Medical/Research Officer) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Guwahati Scientist C Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Guwahati Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download AIIMS Guwahati Scientist C (Medical/Non-Medical/Research Officer) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Scientist C (Medical/Non-Medical/Research Officer): Medical: MBBS/BVSc/BDS with 3 years experience or MBBS/BVSc/BDS + PhD/MPH or MBBS/BVSc/BDS + PG degree AND at least two research publications as first/corresponding author in SCI-indexed or Scopus Q1 journals. Non-Medical: PG Degree (Public Health, Health Economics, HTA, Epidemiology, Biostatistics, Pharmaceutical sciences, biotechnology, biomedical engineering, Data Science or related) with 3 years post qualification experience or PhD AND at least two research publications as first/corresponding author in SCI-indexed or Scopus Q1 journals.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 40 years for all posts.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Guwahati Scientist C (Medical/Non-Medical/Research Officer) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Guwahati to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Guwahati Scientist C Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Guwahati Scientist C Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Scientist C (Medical/Non-Medical/Research Officer) post at AIIMS Guwahati is 27 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Scientist C posts in AIIMS Guwahati?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Scientist C (Medical/Non-Medical/Research Officer) post in the AIIMS Guwahati recruitment drive for 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Scientist C position at AIIMS Guwahati?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Scientist C (Medical/Non-Medical/Research Officer) post should not exceed 40 years of age as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for a Scientist C at AIIMS Guwahati?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Scientist C (Medical/Non-Medical/Research Officer) position will receive a salary of Rs 67000 + HRA per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for AIIMS Guwahati Scientist C Recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the AIIMS Guwahati Scientist C (Medical/Non-Medical/Research Officer) recruitment is online. Candidates need to submit their applications through the official website.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Guwahati Scientist C posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the AIIMS Guwahati Scientist C (Medical/Non-Medical/Research Officer) recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What are the essential qualifications for Scientist C (Medical) at AIIMS Guwahati?
faq.answer: For Medical Scientist C, candidates need MBBS/BVSc/BDS with 3 years experience or PG/PhD, plus two research publications as first/corresponding author in SCI-indexed or Scopus Q1 journals.

faq.question: Q8. What are the essential qualifications for Scientist C (Non-Medical) at AIIMS Guwahati?
faq.answer: For Non-Medical Scientist C, candidates need a PG Degree or PhD in relevant fields like Public Health, Health Economics, or Data Science, with 3 years experience or PhD, plus two research publications.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for AIIMS Guwahati Scientist C Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Scientist C post includes shortlisting, a written test (if applicable), an interview, and document verification.

faq.question: Q10. When is the interview date for AIIMS Guwahati Scientist C Recruitment?
faq.answer: The interview for the AIIMS Guwahati Scientist C (Medical/Non-Medical/Research Officer) recruitment is scheduled for 30 July 2026.
